text:
PRODUCT MONOGRAPH

Pr PIQRAY
(alpelisib tablets)

Tablets: 50 mg, 150 mg, 200 mg

Antineoplastic

Novartis Pharmaceuticals Canada Inc.
385 Bouchard Blvd.
Dorval, Quebec
H9S 1A9

Date of Revision: March 11, 2021
Submission Control No.: 245178

6 DOSAGE FORMS, COMPOSITION AND PACKAGING

Composition

Non-Medicinal Ingredients:
Core tablets: hypromellose, magnesium stearate, mannitol, microcrystalline cellulose, sodium starch glycolate
Coating: hypromellose, iron oxide black, iron oxide red, polyethylene glycol, talc, titanium dioxide

Description

PIQRAY (alpelisib) tablets are available in the following strengths:
• 50 mg: light pink, round, film-coated tablets debossed with "LHV" on one side and "50" on the other side
• 150 mg: pale red, ovaloid, film-coated tablets debossed with "NVR" on one side and "LBE" on the other side
• 200 mg: light red, ovaloid, film-coated tablets debossed with "NVR" on one side and "LBX" on the other side

Packaging

PIQRAY 50 mg and 150 mg tablets are provided in aluminium PVC/PCTFE blisters; 56-tablet carton.
PIQRAY 200 mg tablets are provided in aluminium PVC/PCTFE blisters; 30-tablet carton.

13 PHARMACEUTICAL INFORMATION

Drug Substance
Proper name: alpelisib
Chemical name: (S)-N1-(4-methyl-5-(2-(1,1,1-trifluoro-2-methylpropan-2-yl)pyridin-4-yl)thiazol-2-yl)pyrrolidine-1,2-dicarboxamide

Molecular formula: C19H22F3N5O2S
Molecular mass: 441.48 g/mol

Solubility:
The solubility of alpelisib is pH-dependent.
pH 2.0: 0.57 mg/mL
pH 4.5: 0.12 mg/mL
pH 6.8: <0.001 mg/mL

Partition coefficient: logP = 1.6
Osmolality: Not applicable
